created_by: Codex sanitized extraction from local CSV/HAR-derived data
created_at_note: Generated from local files during the June 2026 Tria Marketplace research thread.
privacy_note: Sensitive HAR/request material, cookies, auth tokens, private headers, profile image URLs, exact coordinates, and raw GraphQL payloads are intentionally omitted.

seller_summary.location_pattern: Listings consistently show Orland Park, IL; exact coordinates omitted.

sold_timestamp_conclusion.reason: Extracted sold-history PDP/listing objects expose is_sold/renderable_listing_status and listing creation_time, but no sold_at/sold_time/marked_sold_at field was found in the source rows.
sold_timestamp_conclusion.important_caveat: creation_time is listing creation time, not sale time. sold_har_display_rank is display/order context only, not a timestamp.

target_listing.title: Tria Laser Removal
target_listing.description:
Tria hair removal, used twice only on the face.
Has a small scratch as shown in the picture but it’s working 100%.
Has charger and plugs for all outlets types that could be used in any country.
Purchased originally 2 years ago for $245.
